name: Publish To NextClaw Marketplace
summary: Publish or update local skills in the NextClaw marketplace with explicit v0.17.6+ readiness checks, platform username rules, scoped package naming, and post-publish verification.

summaryI18n.en: Publish or update local skills in the NextClaw marketplace with explicit v0.17.6+ readiness checks, platform username rules, scoped package naming, and post-publish verification.
summaryI18n.zh: 帮助用户把本地 skill 发布或更新到 NextClaw marketplace，明确覆盖 v0.17.6+ 版本门槛、平台用户名规则、scope 包名规范与发布后校验。

description: Use this skill when the user wants to publish or update a local skill in the NextClaw marketplace. It enforces the NextClaw v0.17.6+ baseline, distinguishes official and personal publishing scopes, keeps the platform username requirement visible, and completes remote verification plus install smoke after upload.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants to publish or update a local skill in the NextClaw marketplace. It enforces the NextClaw v0.17.6+ baseline, distinguishes official and personal publishing scopes, keeps the platform username requirement visible, and completes remote verification plus install smoke after upload.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望把本地 skill 发布或更新到 NextClaw marketplace 时使用此技能。它会强制检查 NextClaw v0.17.6+ 基线，区分官方与个人发布 scope，明确平台用户名前置条件，并在上传后补齐远端校验与安装冒烟。

author: NextClaw
